J,A,C,KHORNER##J,A,C,KFROST

Table staple, of sorts
You might find one at a sawmill
Times going onto a secure site
Delivery expediters
Open
Chronicler of events
Bad spells?
Gentle decline?
One of a Jewish biblical trio
Party mixer
Actor Penn of the Harold and Kumar movies
Show instability
Untested
Make no bones about
Grandparent, often
With 39-Across, apt title for this puzzle
See 36-Across
Flimflammed
Terra ___
Big inits. in bowling
Diversion with 81 squares
Some meditation
Coffin cover
Bounce back and forth quickly
Before surgery, briefly
"Meet the Fockers" co-star
Blankets
More unctuous
Bistros
Part of a meter
One in a corner
Figure often mentioned by meteorologists

Ray preceder
Chaney or Chaney Jr.
Dept. of Justice chiefs
Pointed to
Soup brand
Eschewer of fat
1971 Bond girl ___ Wood
Certain porcelain piece
Thom ___ shoes
Some ties
Leading record label of the early 1900s
Domicile
Stick pulled from a pile
Got clean
Bandage trademark
Some Caribbean music
Pilgrimage near year's end
___ mater
Playground user
Addis Ababa is its capital: Abbr.
Coral formation
I, in Innsbruck
Too many hits might result in them, for short
One hit might result in it, for short
Sch. in Pocatello

Type of pasta
